missingItems.name: Source Sheet
Dark Ego - Taking Destiny into My Own Hands
What I Don’t Want to See
Dark Ego - All Eyes on Me
In the Right Place at the Right Time
Dark Ego - It’s Time to Kill the Beast
A small wooden crown painted with gold, given to me by my father
A bag containing everything needed to process milk and make butter
A precious bracelet engraved with a cradle, a gift from my mother
A well-worn blanket that I love and use as a cloak
A bag full of coins and valuables that I often lose
Dark Ego - You Are What You Fight
A theater mask with a long nose that I use to hide my Asian features
A katana that belonged to a famous samurai
A traveling bag containing boiled rice and bean paste
A few trinkets the Order insists on calling “Treasures”
A small portrait of the only human I ever loved
A pair of fine dark glasses
An ash stake crusted with blood
A dozen vials of my blood
A vial of precious human blood
Dark Ego - The Napoleon of Crime
A fine pipe to remember me by
A broad cape concealing stilettos and poisons

Boots with hidden pockets. I am the greatest criminal mastermind of all time, and the echoes of my misdeeds have reverberated around the world. Thanks to my incredible cunning, I have always made fools of the authorities, pulled off the most incredible thefts, and manipulated institutions like puppets in my hands. All this until I crossed paths with the World’s Most Famous Investigator. I knew immediately that he would be a challenge worthy of my talents, and for years we battled each other through misdeeds and investigations. On the day of our showdown, however, I realized the truth that I had always tried to hide in my heart. What united us was not rivalry, but the love that can only be felt for someone who is your perfect better half. Feigning death, we retired to private life, but the idyll was shortlived. Called to duty on an international case, he broke our pact and returned to the limelight to do what he does best. Distraught and wounded, I took refuge in the Order. As a Hunter, I used my brilliant mind to fight the darkness and forget my lost love. Moriarty the Gentleman Thief
Shovels and picks for digging holes and trenches
A bottle of fine brandy waiting for its chance to be opened
The key to the secret hiding place where we have accumulated our life’s earnings, but whose location no one remembers (damned drunks!)
A handkerchief for each of us, sewn by a pure and special girl we defended from the Order Hunters
Documents and deeds from over a hundred trials
A ring of little value given to me by my first client
A scroll of recommendations written by the Pope himself
A snake-shaped flask containing a strong acid
A necklace of great value engraved with the word “Brísingamen”
Various musical instruments and juggling equipment
A series of sharp daggers hidden throughout my clothing
A diary in which are written the names of all the men and women whose hearts I have broken
A brooch in the shape of a sleigh
A small knife with a blade made of ice that never melts
A large key to a castle whose location you ignore
A mirror fragment with a strange magical aura
Two trained pigeons you can use to send messages
A set of long sewing pins
A long cloak and a mask depicting a smiling mother
Vials and jars with pieces of cadavers preserved in alcohol
A valuable machine that generates electricity
False documents to gain access to morgues and cemeteries
A handkerchief embroidered with the name of my beloved Elizabeth
A long cloak of green cloth
Coats of arms and medals earned in service
A fine cross necklace given me by my old flame Marian
A certificate of merit penned by a prince
Dark Ego - The Magic of Disbelief
A book of fairytales given to me by Gwendolyn, the only person I consider a friend
A necklace with a little bell
A worn pirate flag I keep as a trophy
A small bag of fruit for Eurylochus
A tome on the animal world
